payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and rectangular frame; varnished surface shows a vertical light reflection, no visible hardware, faint wear/scuffs near edges, and the top/bottom appear slightly cropped — estimated ~1.5 m from camera.
